name: seo-intelligence
description: AI-powered SEO analysis, competitor comparison, and ranking plans. Analyze any page's SEO health, compare against top-ranking competitors, and get prioritized action plans to rank higher.
long_description:
SEO Intelligence turns Claude into your personal SEO analyst. Give it any URL and target keywords, and it will crawl the page, analyze on-page SEO health (title, meta, headings, content, schema, images, links), search Google SERPs to find who's ranking above you, perform a detailed competitor gap analysis, and generate a prioritized action plan to outrank the competition.

Built with a BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) architecture — the plugin is 100% free. You provide your own SerpAPI key for SERP data (free tier: 100 searches/month). Three tools work with zero configuration and no API key required.

20+ years of SEO expertise codified into algorithms: gap analysis, ranking strategies, scoring, and actionable recommendations — all accessible through natural conversation with Claude.
author: Bhargav Patel

use_cases.title: Blog & Content SEO Health Check
use_cases.description: Analyze any blog post or content page for SEO issues — missing meta descriptions, broken heading hierarchy, no FAQ schema, thin content — and get the 5 quickest fixes.

use_cases.title: Competitive Gap Analysis
use_cases.description: Compare your page against the top 3 Google results for any keyword. See exactly where you fall short — content depth, schema markup, heading structure, link profiles — and what to fix first.

use_cases.title: SEO Ranking Action Plan
use_cases.description: Generate a prioritized, step-by-step plan to rank higher for a target keyword, with specific on-page changes, effort/impact scores, and categorized recommendations.

use_cases.title: Multi-Keyword Full Audit
use_cases.description: Run a comprehensive SEO audit across multiple keywords at once — get per-keyword competitor comparisons, gap analyses, individual ranking plans, and an overall site SEO score.

use_cases.title: Client SEO Reporting
use_cases.description: Freelancers and agencies can generate structured, professional SEO audit reports for clients — with scores, gap analyses, and prioritized action plans — in minutes.

use_cases.title: Quick Wins for New Sites
use_cases.description: Developers and site owners new to SEO can instantly discover the 5 easiest, highest-impact fixes to improve search visibility with zero SEO expertise required.

use_cases.title: Technical SEO Infrastructure Check
use_cases.description: Check your site's technical SEO health — sitemap.xml, robots.txt, SSL/HTTPS, redirect chains, canonical tags, mobile readiness — and get pass/warn/fail for each check.

use_cases.title: Content Planning & Briefs
use_cases.description: Automatically generate SEO content briefs from competitor analysis — with suggested titles, headings, word count targets, questions to answer, and key topics to cover.

use_cases.title: Keyword Strategy & Clustering
use_cases.description: Group related keywords by SERP overlap to build content clusters. Detect keyword cannibalization where multiple pages compete for the same keyword.

use_cases.title: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)
use_cases.description: Check if your domain is cited as a source in AI search engines like Perplexity, ChatGPT, and Google SGE for target queries.

use_cases.title: Entity & Semantic SEO
use_cases.description: Map your target topics to official Google Knowledge Graph entities to improve semantic relevance and build topical authority.

features.title: On-Page SEO Analysis
features.description: Crawl any URL for a complete SEO health check: title, meta, headings, word count, links, images, FAQ, schema, OG tags, and SEO score (0-100).

features.title: Live Google SERP Data
features.description: Real-time Google search results via SerpAPI — organic rankings, SERP features, People Also Ask, and featured snippets.

features.title: Competitor Gap Analysis
features.description: Automatically crawl top-ranking pages and compare against your page across content, structure, meta, schema, links, and images.

features.title: Prioritized Ranking Plans
features.description: Numbered action plans with specific changes, effort levels (Easy/Medium/Hard), impact (High/Medium/Low), and categories.

features.title: Quick Wins
features.description: Instantly surface the 5 easiest fixes with the biggest SEO impact — perfect for getting started fast.

features.title: Multi-Keyword Audit
features.description: Comprehensive audit across multiple target keywords with per-keyword competitor analysis and overall scoring.

features.title: API Key Validator
features.description: Verify SerpAPI configuration with setup instructions and sign-up links for missing keys.

features.title: Technical SEO Audit
features.description: Check sitemap.xml, robots.txt, SSL/HTTPS, redirect chains, canonical tags, viewport, lang, and charset — all with actionable recommendations.

features.title: Search Intent Classification
features.description: Classify keywords as informational, navigational, transactional, or commercial — with confidence scores and recommended content types.

features.title: Content Brief Generator
features.description: Auto-generate content briefs from competitor analysis: titles, headings, word count targets, questions, and key topics.

features.title: Keyword Clustering
features.description: Group keywords by SERP URL overlap to identify which keywords can target the same page and avoid cannibalization.

features.title: Cannibalization Detection
features.description: Find keywords where multiple pages from the same domain compete against each other, with severity ratings and fix recommendations.

features.title: AI Citation & AEO Check
features.description: Evaluate Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) visibility across Perplexity, OpenAI, and Google SGE.

features.title: Entity SEO Analysis
features.description: Verify official entities via Google Knowledge Graph to strengthen schema markup and entity associations.

features.title: Predictive Keyword Difficulty
features.description: Estimate ranking difficulty (0-100) based on SERP analysis, with ROI and timeline projections.

api_keys.name: SERPAPI_KEY
api_keys.description: SerpAPI key for SERP data (100 free searches/month)

api_keys.name: PERPLEXITY_API_KEY
api_keys.description: Perplexity API key for AEO visibility tracking (Optional)

api_keys.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
api_keys.description: OpenAI API key for ChatGPT AEO analysis (Optional)

api_keys.name: GOOGLE_CLOUD_API_KEY
api_keys.description: Google Cloud API key for Knowledge Graph (Optional)
